---
title: "local_pca"
author: "Andrea Estandia"
date: "03/04/2026"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup}
# Knitr settings: 
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file())
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, eval = FALSE)
options(scipen = 999)
```

```{r}
source("./src/wm-europe_source.R")
```

```{r}
pca <- fread(file.path(reports_path, "local_pca", "1000", "pcoa_coords.tsv"))

umap <- fread(file.path(reports_path, "local_pca", "1000", "umap_coords.tsv")) %>% mutate(n=1:nrow(.))

pca %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=window_id, y=PC1)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_bw()
```
